title: papaver argemone var. apulum
intro: Papaver argemone var. apulum, also known as the Armenian poppy or corn poppy, is a variety of the poppy plant, which is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its alkaloid content, particularly in its seeds. The health benefits of Papaver argemone var. apulum include its potential to improve sleep quality, alleviate anxiety and stress, and even exhibit antiseptic properties. Traditionally, the plant's seeds are used to make herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects.
